response.global_analysis: Audio is entirely in English (spoken talk segments). The music performance from 02:53 to 04:30 is a violin instrumental of 'Bara no Chikai' (蕐薇の誓い); since there are no vocals, no lyrics are provided, but on-screen text identifying the song and composer is transcribed. The character mistakenly attributes the song to the 'Rozen Maiden OST' (the composer Mitsumune Shinkichi worked on both Rozen Maiden and Utena, but this song is from Utena). Timing is strictly aligned with the spoken word waveforms, and long sentences are split to remain under the 50-character limit.
